title: iModyz Modpack
description: ✨ A modpack that combines performance-boosting ⚡ and client-side enhancing 🎨 mods for a smoother, faster, and more intuitive gameplay experience! 🚀💨
body:
# iModyz Modpack 🪄
- This modpack is designed for survival players, creative builders, and content creators. It includes performance-enhancing mods, lightweight shaders, and quality-of-life improvements—all without compromising the vanilla experience. Specifically optimized for low-end PCs, this pack ensures smooth gameplay despite the "light mods and shaders" label.

- You might wonder how easing mods can exist without disrupting the vanilla feel. 🤔 The answer lies in carefully chosen additions like Litematica and Axiom, which allow pro builders to transfer their creations from creative worlds to survival seamlessly. Other mods enhance usability, such as inventory sorting and multi-tab chest access. 🏗️✨

- Are you a new content creator? 🎥 We've got you covered with mods that make recording, building, and showcasing your work easier than ever! 🚀

<details>
<summary>Share Your Adventure🌍✨</summary>

Hey there! While playing with our modpack, don't forget to share your best moments! You can submit your screenshots in our Discord server—who knows? You might just get featured here! 🎮📸

</details>

<details>
<summary>Join Our Team & Make an Impact! 🚀</summary>
Do you have skills that could help improve our modpack? Don't hesitate to apply in our Discord server! Head over to the #contact-staff room and let us know how you can contribute. 🛠️✨

You could become a support team member, modpack contributor, and more! Help shape the future of our community while doing what you love. 💡🎮
</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
We do not take credit for making any of the mods that are included in the modpack.

###### Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
</details>
